text: Science has a clearer story about ubiquitin proteasome than social media does. This tiny protein is a master regulator in our cells. It tags unwanted proteins for destruction, ensuring balance and health. Disruption in this system can lead to diseases like cancer and neurodegeneration. So, next time you hear about proteins, remember the unseen hero: ubiquitin. Curious about more science secrets? Hit that follow button!
